text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon is hosting a holiday meet and greet
with her fans. We head to the event space
together to find...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow, there's so many people! Do you think some
huge idol is holding an event?
choice_data_list:
I think there's an event for a huge Umadol
called Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...What?! You mean all these people are my fans?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wooow... This is... amazing!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hello, Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We were expecting you to arrive two minutes and
forty seconds ago. Please hurry to the waiting
room.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Flash? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It's not just me. There's also...

text_block_list.name: Dirt Runner B
text_block_list.text:
This is the line to meet Falco! The line for
merchandise is on the other side!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wow... They're all here to help me out?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that a number of runners she's faced in
the past gladly offered to help as soon as she
announced the meet and greet.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is very grateful for your efforts in
promoting dirt racing.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It seems they were looking for a way to repay
you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aw... Sniffle... I'm gonna cry.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: And thank you too, Flash! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I just happened to have time in my schedule.
Don't mention it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
On that note, if this drags on, it will be a
problem. Please proceed to the waiting room
right away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, more than double the expected
amount of fans show up to the meet, each and
every one of them showing incredible passion.

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text: Whoaaaa... You're so cute!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Um, I've only just recently become your fan, but
I'll be supporting you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Watching you run so hard for the top always gives
me energy!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! ♪ I'm gonna keep on running
just like that! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I-is everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, a notepad! Let's see...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: "I love you!"

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you! ☆ Message received loud and clear! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for finding the courage to make it here
today! Please keep supporting me!

text_block_list.name: Emotional Fan
text_block_list.text: ...D-d-def... def... Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text: Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You're the girl from the riverbank! You
came! ☆

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You shined so bright today!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you! ☆ That makes me so happy!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I got your letter too! The glittery stickers you
decorated it with were so cute! ☆ Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. By the way, I decided what I wanna be
when I grow up!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text: I wanna be an Umadol, just like you!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text: Let's sing together someday! Wait for me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'll be waiting for you on the sparkling
stage!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I just love how powerfully you run! You're so
cool... and cute... I love you, Falcooo!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you work so hard is what keeps me going...
It makes me want to devote everything to
running.

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Falco... Thank you for becoming an
Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I should be the one thanking you! I'm so glad that
you found me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The kind words of her many fans energize Smart
Falcon. Finally, during her concluding remarks...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Honestly, I've been a bit flustered lately.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All I've been able to think about is that I need to win—that I need to be at the top.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I felt like it was all on me to make dirt racing
more popular, which turned into a lot of pressure.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: You don't have to worry about that!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks! ☆ And you're right! I'm totally okay
now!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You know why? Because I got to see everyone's
faces up close and personal today!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm so lucky to have received so much warmth
from everyone.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So I thought to myself today... Maybe being at
the top isn't what's most important.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What's important is that I accept everyone's
feelings and shine as bright as I can!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm the Umadol of the dirt, but I'm also
everybody's Umadol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The meet and greet comes to a close amidst great
merriment. Next up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At long last—the Tokyo Daishoten awaits us!
